case_title: PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY VS. HECTOR OCHOA RODRIGUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, HECTOR OCHOA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-24-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-19-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-26-2002
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED FEB-06-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, HECTOR OCHOA
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, HECTOR OCHOA
STATUS CONFERENCE OF MAY-24-2002 CONTINUED TO JUL-26-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-26-2002 CONTINUED TO SEP-20-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $151.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, HECTOR OCHOA
DECLARATION OF LEYLA MORRIS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR COURT DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION OF ANTHONY CARCIOPPOLO IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION COURT DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, HECTOR OCHOA $10,341.00 PRINCIPAL, $504.30 INTEREST, $151.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,996.30, SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-20-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT ISSUED-- FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE WEST INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, HECTOR OCHOA
